narrative:
Cambridge City has 5,540 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points.
